title: Injured Effects
description:
This mod adds effects to being low on HP! 
This applies to players, aswell as humanoid entities like villagers, illagers, and piglins!
body:
Don't feel injured enough when you get hurt?

Introducing Injured Effects!

This datapack by [Rainy Realm Creations](https://modrinth.com/organization/rainy-realm-creations) adds new cosmetic injured effects to the game.

What effects?

- Darkening Shock - Applies the darkness effect when too low on health. - Heartbeat - The sound of your beating heart becomes louder and faster as you take more and more damage. - Open Wound - Blood particles will appear at low health as you struggle to heal those wounds.

Support:

For questions, bug reports, suggestions, and any other support, check out our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/XHbR7pSwdW)! You might also get some sneak peaks at upcoming updates!

Config!

Run the following command to customize your experience! ``` /function inj-eff:config ``` You can toggle all effects!
